Database Modules

src.crud.user.consume_reset_token(db: Session, user: User, new_password: str) → User[source]

src.crud.user.get_users_by_email(db: Session, email: str) → list[User][source]

Get all users with the given email (across all tenants).

src.crud.inventory.get_low_stock_items(db: Session, tenant_id: str, location_id: str | None = None) → list[InventoryItem][source]

Return items where on_hand_qty <= reorder_level_qty.

src.crud.inventory.get_reorder_list_items(db: Session, tenant_id: str, location_id: str, *, ordered: bool = False) → list[InventoryItem][source]

Low-stock items split by whether they have been marked as ordered.

src.crud.inventory.get_txns_by_inventory_item(db: Session, inventory_item_id: str, skip: int = 0, limit: int = 100) → list[InventoryTxn][source]
src.crud.inventory.get_txns_by_tenant(db: Session, tenant_id: str, skip: int = 0, limit: int = 100) → list[InventoryTxn][source]
src.crud.inventory.mark_inventory_item_ordered(db: Session, item_id: str) → InventoryItem | None[source]
src.crud.inventory.update_inventory_item(db: Session, item_id: str, data: InventoryItemUpdate) → InventoryItem | None[source]
exception src.crud.formula.InsufficientInventoryError(insufficient_items: list[dict])[source]

Bases: Exception

Raised when there is insufficient inventory to create a formula.

src.crud.formula.count_formulas_by_customer(db: Session, tenant_id: str, customer_id: str, location_id: str | None = None) → int[source]
src.crud.formula.count_formulas_by_tenant(db: Session, tenant_id: str, location_id: str | None = None) → int[source]
src.crud.formula.create_formula(db: Session, data: FormulaCreate) → Formula[source]

Create a formula with its items and automatically: 1. Validate sufficient inventory for all items 2. Record inventory CONSUME transactions for each product used. 3. Deduct stock from inventory_items.

Raises InsufficientInventoryError if insufficient inventory.

src.crud.formula.create_formula_visit(db: Session, data: FormulaVisitCreate) → FormulaVisit[source]

Create one visit ticket with multiple labeled bowls (formulas) atomically. Validates inventory for all bowls before deducting anything.

src.crud.formula.delete_formula(db: Session, formula_id: str) → bool[source]
src.crud.formula.get_formula(db: Session, formula_id: str) → Formula | None[source]
src.crud.formula.get_formula_visit(db: Session, visit_id: str) → FormulaVisit | None[source]
src.crud.formula.get_formulas_by_customer(db: Session, tenant_id: str, customer_id: str, location_id: str | None = None, skip: int = 0, limit: int = 50) → list[Formula][source]
src.crud.formula.get_formulas_by_tenant(db: Session, tenant_id: str, location_id: str | None = None, skip: int = 0, limit: int = 100) → list[Formula][source]
src.crud.formula.update_formula(db: Session, formula_id: str, data: FormulaUpdate) → Formula | None[source]

CRUD and seed for subscription plans and platform billing config.
